# Atlas Full Audit — Battle Test Suite

**Version:** Atlas v0.3 (B8 complete, async/await)
**Date:** 2026-03-07
**Generated by:** Haiku 4.5 (programs), Sonnet 4.6 (harness + audit)
**Goal:** Full-breadth audit of every Atlas feature. Measure AI generation quality,
language friction, error message quality, and AI-first design compliance.

## Hypothesis

If Atlas is AI-first, Haiku 4.5 should generate correct Atlas programs on the
first or second pass, with minimal friction. Failures in generation = language bugs.

## How to Run

```bash
# Run all programs through Atlas (interpreter)
./run.sh

# Run Rust harness (both engines, parity check)
cargo nextest run -p atlas-runtime -E 'test(battle)'
```

## Domain Coverage

| Domain | Programs | Features |
|--------|----------|---------|
| 01-primitives | 5 | number, string, bool, null, let/let mut |
| 02-control-flow | 5 | if/else, while, for-in, match, break |
| 03-functions | 5 | fn, closures, recursion, higher-order |
| 04-types | 6 | struct, enum, Option, Result, type alias |
| 05-traits | 4 | trait, impl, dispatch, default methods |
| 06-collections | 5 | array, HashMap, HashSet, iteration |
| 07-error-handling | 4 | Result, ?, match, error chaining |
| 08-async-await | 5 | async fn, await, sleep, futureAll, race |
| 09-stdlib | 5 | string ops, math, json, file I/O |
| 10-integration | 3 | multi-feature realistic programs |

**Total:** 47 Atlas programs across 10 domains

## Audit Reports

- `audit/friction.md` — per-domain generation friction log
- `audit/grammar.md` — grammar/syntax issues found
- `audit/errors.md` — error message quality assessment
- `audit/ai-first-score.md` — final AI-first compliance score
- `audit/haiku-session.md` — raw Haiku generation log
